evals.prompt: 帮我分析一下 /var/log/services/api/app.log 最近的报错。
evals.expected_output: 读取或要求提供指定日志内容，按 trace/correlation id、线程或时间窗口拆分链路，聚焦最近报错并给出证据和必要的深挖命令。

assertions.text: Handles local file path or asks for log content when path is not readable
Extracts timestamp, level, execution context, component, correlation id, and message when present
Splits logs into independent request/task/message traces
Uses focused mode because the user asks about errors
Provides scoped grep/zgrep commands only if current evidence is insufficient

evals.prompt:
这段日志帮我看看为什么接口超时了：
2026-03-09 21:15:01.234 [http-worker-5] INFO api traceId=abc123 GET /v1/resources started
2026-03-09 21:15:01.235 [http-worker-5] DEBUG service traceId=abc123 calling downstream service
2026-03-09 21:15:06.789 [http-worker-5] WARN service traceId=abc123 downstream call took 5554ms
2026-03-09 21:15:06.790 [http-worker-5] ERROR api traceId=abc123 request timeout after 5555ms
evals.expected_output: 聚焦模式报告：直接回答超时原因是下游调用耗时约 5554ms，给出证据链、时间线和针对性排查建议。

assertions.text: Uses focused mode since user asks why timeout
Conclusion directly answers the timeout cause
Identifies the slow downstream call as the main bottleneck
Quantifies total duration and slow segment duration
Avoids unrelated full-system diagnosis

evals.expected_output: 字段溯源模式报告：识别 subjectRef/actorRef 为疑似同义字段，指出入口、映射、RPC 均有值，最终响应组装阶段变空或未映射；不能断言下游未返回 subjectRef，只能说明下游返回的是 actorRef。

assertions.text: Uses field tracing mode
Maps subjectRef and actorRef as suspected aliases with evidence
Marks entry, service mapping, and RPC payload/response as having values
Identifies response assembly or field mapping as the earliest visible anomaly
Does not claim the downstream service failed to receive the field

evals.prompt:
帮我分析下这段日志，没什么特别的问题，就想了解整体情况。
2026-03-09 11:00:00.000 [worker-1] INFO job traceId=q1 task started batchSize=20
2026-03-09 11:00:00.120 [worker-1] INFO job traceId=q1 processed count=20 success=20 failed=0
2026-03-09 11:00:00.125 [worker-1] INFO job traceId=q1 task finished cost=125ms
evals.expected_output: 快速概览模式报告：输出日志行数、时间跨度、独立链路数、任务耗时和成功统计；未发现明显异常时简洁说明，不输出无关深挖命令。

assertions.text: Uses quick overview mode for a small log without a specific question
Reports line count, time span, trace count, and task duration
Identifies success=20 failed=0 as normal completion
Does not expand unnecessary deep diagnosis
Omits deep-dive commands because no suspicious point exists

evals.prompt:
用 --deep 帮我分析这批日志：
2026-03-09 12:00:00.000 [http-worker-1] INFO api traceId=t1 GET /v1/items start
2026-03-09 12:00:00.030 [db-worker-1] DEBUG db traceId=t1 query item id=100 cost=28ms
2026-03-09 12:00:00.061 [db-worker-1] DEBUG db traceId=t1 query item id=101 cost=29ms
2026-03-09 12:00:00.093 [db-worker-1] DEBUG db traceId=t1 query item id=102 cost=30ms
2026-03-09 12:00:00.130 [http-worker-1] INFO api traceId=t1 GET /v1/items done cost=130ms
2026-03-09 12:00:01.000 [consumer-0] INFO consumer traceId=t2 messageId=m1 consume start
2026-03-09 12:00:06.200 [consumer-0] WARN consumer traceId=t2 downstream timeout after 5000ms retry=1
2026-03-09 12:00:06.260 [consumer-0] ERROR consumer traceId=t2 consume failed messageId=m1 error=DOWNSTREAM_TIMEOUT
evals.expected_output: 深度诊断模式报告：拆出 HTTP 查询链路和消息消费链路；识别 t2 为 CRITICAL/WARNING 的下游超时失败；识别 t1 可能存在重复查询/N+1 风险但耗时较小；给出量化耗时、链路总览和最小深挖命令。

assertions.text: Uses deep diagnosis mode because --deep is present
Splits t1 and t2 into separate traces
Classifies the message consumer timeout/failure as higher severity than the repeated queries
Quantifies the 5000ms downstream timeout and 130ms HTTP request duration
Suggests scoped follow-up commands for t2 or downstream timeout rather than broad unrelated commands

evals.prompt: 查日志最佳实践：我们用 Loki，想按 traceId 和 orderId 快速查问题，是否应该把它们做成 label？顺便给一个查询计划。
evals.expected_output: 日志检索/查询优化模式报告：先限定目标、时间窗、service/env 和 pivot；说明 traceId/orderId 属于高基数字段，不应作为 Loki label，建议作为日志内容或 structured metadata 查询；给出先选低基数 label stream 再用 trace/order 过滤的最小查询计划。

assertions.text: Uses log search/query optimization mode
Warns that traceId and orderId are high-cardinality fields and should not be Loki labels
Recommends low-cardinality labels such as service/app/env/namespace/cluster
Provides a scoped query plan with goal, range, pivot, purpose, and expected result
Mentions structured metadata or log content filtering for high-cardinality identifiers

evals.expected_output: 识别为结构化 JSONL，优先按 trace.id、service.name、timestamp、severity/duration_ms 字段查询；给出 jq 或平台字段查询思路；直接指出同一 trace 下发生 2000ms 下游超时。

assertions.text: Treats JSONL as structured logs rather than plain text only
Uses trace.id to correlate the two entries
Identifies the ERROR timeout and quantifies duration_ms=2000
Suggests field-based jq or platform field queries if more context is needed
Does not recommend a broad unscoped grep as the first choice
